answers.question: Does the district have composting?
answers.answer: Yes, the district has composting. The statute mentions that John Jay Middle School implements a food scrap composting program from 2013 to 2016, and that KLSD made significant gains on composting in 2018-2019.

answers.question: How much recycling do the schools do?
How does the district work to reduce waste?
answers.answer: The district works to reduce waste by taking food scraps out of the waste stream in all KLSD elementary schools (2012-2013) and implementing a food scrap composting program at John Jay Middle School (2013-2016). Additionally, the district has made significant gains in composting and recycling (2018-2019).
